title: Bren: 3D Guns
description: 3D models for the guns of the Bren mod
body:
I enjoy the mod [Bren](https://modrinth.com/mod/bren) by sniffiandros, but felt it could be improved with 3D models for its guns.

![Showcase of the gun models. Normal versions on top, Netherite on bottom. from right to left: Auto Gun, Machine Gun, Revolver, Rifle, and Shotgun.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08cf3d5ecf1793ac7325170adf4622a160723bbc_0.webp)

Included are custom 3D models of the Auto Gun, Machine Gun, Revolver, Rifle, and Shotgun; as well as their Netherite versions. Variations to account for magazines and clothed magazines are also included. The clothed magazine remains dyable as well.

Models and textures created in Blockbench
